description_long: This is a Soviet-era military jet aircraft with a streamlined, metallic fuselage painted in a light gray color and adorned with red star insignias on the wings and tail. The aircraft features a single engine intake at the nose, swept-back wings mounted low on the fuselage, and a conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer. The landing gear is deployed, with a single nose wheel and two main wheels under the wings. The cockpit is positioned forward on the fuselage and is enclosed with a clear canopy. The surface of the airplane is marked with panel lines and the number '404' is prominently displayed near the nose.
description: A gray Soviet jet fighter with swept-back low wings, red star insignias, and a forward-enclosed cockpit. Features a single nose intake and deployed tricycle landing gear.
description_view_0: Front-left view showing the nose intake, forward cockpit, left wing with red star, and deployed nose and left main landing gear.
description_view_1: Rear-left view highlighting the tail section, swept-back wings, and the left-side red star insignias on the wing and tail.
description_view_2: Rear-right view displaying the right wing, tail assembly, and the engine exhaust at the rear of the fuselage.
description_view_3: Front-right view focusing on the nose intake, right wing with red star, and the deployed landing gear.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing, swept-back wings with no visible winglets or pronounced dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: Single jet engine with nose intake and rear exhaust.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Tricycle landing gear with one nose wheel and two main wheels, all deployed.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed single-seat cockpit with a clear canopy.
